headline: Bruno Guimarães
body: 🚨 BREAKING: Bruno Guimarães has agreed a FIVE-YEAR contract with Arsenal and wants to join the Gunners. Newcastle rejected an initial €70m offer.🔴🇧🇷 AFC (via lequipe)
raw_text:
🚨 BREAKING: Bruno Guimarães has agreed a FIVE-YEAR contract with Arsenal and wants to join the Gunners. Newcastle rejected an initial €70m offer.🔴🇧🇷 #AFC

(via @lequipe)
